title: Send api_schema in the model registration webhook to hokusai-site
description:
Coordination follow-up to HOK-1465 (hokusai-site).

After HOK-1465 ships in hokusai-site, the model registration webhook handler at `POST /api/webhooks/model-registration` accepts an optional `model.api_schema` field and persists it to the new `Model.api_schema` column. Until the data pipeline starts emitting that field, the webhook ingestion path is dormant and only the manual `POST /api/models/create` route populates the column.

## Scope

* Update the MLflow webhook publisher in this repo to derive a `ModelApiSpec`-shaped object from the registered model's MLflow signature (`mlflow.models.signature`) when available, and include it as `model.api_schema` in the webhook payload sent to `hokusai-site`.
* The site expects:
  * `api_schema.inputSchema` — JSON Schema object (`type: 'object'`, `properties`, `required`).
  * `api_schema.outputSchema` — JSON Schema object.
  * Optional: `endpoint`, `method`, `exampleInput`, `exampleOutput`, `errorCodes` (the site fills sensible defaults if omitted).
* Keep the field optional — payloads without it must still succeed (preserves backward compat with the existing webhook contract).

## Blocked by

* HOK-1465 in hokusai-site (the receiving end).

## Acceptance

* Registering a new model through the data pipeline triggers a webhook whose payload includes `model.api_schema` derived from the MLflow signature.
* The site's API integration tab for that model renders the correct input fields without manual schema entry.
